title: Treasury yields rise as Wall Street awaits retail sales and unemployment data
summary_full: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose over 2 basis points to 4.573%.
summary_public: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — rose over 2 basis points to 4.573%.
